name: Cellpose Inference
title: Cellpose Inference
description: Cell and nucleus segmentation using the Cellpose deep-learning model
author: Hamdah Shafqat Abbasi (hamdahshafqat.abbasi@nih.gov)
institution: National Center for Advancing Translational Sciences, National Institutes of Health

inputs.name: inpDir
inputs.description: Input image collection to be segmented

inputs.name: filePattern
inputs.description: Filepattern to select images inside inpDir

inputs.name: modelType
inputs.description: Pretrained Cellpose model. Default: cpsam (SAM-based, v4+). Legacy: cyto3, cyto2, cyto, nuclei, bact_omni, cyto2_omni

inputs.name: channelCyto
inputs.description: 0-indexed channel for cytoplasm signal

inputs.name: channelNuc
inputs.description: 0-indexed channel for nucleus signal (-1 = none)

inputs.name: diameter
inputs.description: Expected cell diameter in pixels (0 = automatic estimation)

inputs.name: minSize
inputs.description: Minimum number of pixels per mask (-1 disables the filter)

inputs.name: flowThreshold
inputs.description: Maximum allowed flow error for accepted masks. 0 disables this QC step

inputs.name: cellprobThreshold
inputs.description: Cell-probability threshold. Lower values keep more detections

inputs.name: niter
inputs.description: Dynamics iterations (0 = auto, proportional to diameter). Increase for elongated ROIs

inputs.name: do3D
inputs.description: Run full 3-D segmentation across the Z-stack

inputs.name: stitchThreshold
inputs.description: IoU threshold for stitching 2-D masks across Z-planes (0 = disabled, only when do3D=False)

inputs.name: anisotropy
inputs.description: Z/XY voxel size ratio for 3-D segmentation. 1.0 = isotropic voxels

inputs.name: flow3dSmooth
inputs.description: Gaussian sigma for 3-D flow smoothing. Single value or ZYX triple 'z,y,x'. 0 = disabled

inputs.name: noNorm
inputs.description: Disable image normalisation

inputs.name: normPercentile
inputs.description: Normalisation percentile range as 'low,high' (e.g. '1.0,99.0'). Ignored when noNorm=True

inputs.name: batchSize
inputs.description: Number of image tiles per network forward pass. Increase on high-VRAM GPUs

inputs.name: augment
inputs.description: Tile image with overlapping tiles and flip for augmented inference

inputs.name: useGpu
inputs.description: Use GPU acceleration. Cellpose auto-selects CUDA (NVIDIA) → MPS (Apple Silicon) → CPU

inputs.name: excludeOnEdges
inputs.description: Discard masks that touch the border of the image

outputs.name: outDir
outputs.description: Output collection of uint32 label masks

ui.title: Input image collection
ui.description: Input image collection to be segmented

ui.title: Filepattern
ui.description: Filepattern to select images inside inpDir

ui.title: Cell diameter (px)
ui.description: Expected cell diameter in pixels (0 = auto)

ui.title: Minimum mask size (px)
ui.description: Minimum number of pixels per mask (-1 = off)

ui.title: 3-D segmentation
ui.description: Run full 3-D segmentation across the Z-stack

ui.title: Stitch threshold
ui.description: IoU threshold for stitching 2-D masks across Z (0 = off)

ui.title: 3-D flow smoothing
ui.description: Gaussian sigma for 3-D flow smoothing (0 = off)

ui.title: Batch size
ui.description: Number of tiles per forward pass

ui.title: Use GPU
ui.description: Use GPU acceleration (auto-selects CUDA → MPS → CPU)
